note: MAT-1 — slab void systems. solidFraction = NET concrete volume / GROSS slab volume (area x thickness). Rib/waffle/trough/hollow-pot slabs are modelled solid in Revit, so concrete m3, embodied carbon and rebar (ratio x volume) are all over-measured ~30-40% unless the gross volume is multiplied by the solid fraction. Defaults are INDICATIVE (research-seeded ranges below) — refine per project at <project>/_BIM_COORD/STING_SLAB_SYSTEMS.json (additive override by id).
